docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY SALIBELLO, CHRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT MCDOUGALL, AMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED MAY-17-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCDOUGALL, AMY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALIBELLO, CHRISTINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCDOUGALL, AMY $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $330.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MCDOUGALL, AMY
